title: Leyr - Unified EHR Integration API Platform
problem: Healthcare tech companies face fragmented EHR/EMR ecosystem - building point-to-point integrations is expensive, slow, and doesn't scale. Each new region requires new integrations.
solution: Unified API platform that connects to multiple EHR systems through a single integration. No data storage, pass-through architecture. 92% reduction in development time, 2-week average integration time.
technology: API, EHR integration, healthcare data standards, double encryption
target_customer: Healthcare tech companies, digital health platforms, clinic software providers
traction_signals: Growing catalog of connected EHR systems
regulatory_notes: ISO 27001, GDPR, HIPAA compliant. Double encryption on all connections. No patient data storage - pass-through architecture ensures minimal regulatory exposure.
varden_fit: VERY HIGH - Direct infrastructure play. Varden has 15+ EHR integrations - Leyr's model could accelerate new integrations or simplify maintenance. Same target market (clinics, healthcare tech). Potential partnership or acquisition target.
notes: Infrastructure gold. Solves the exact problem Varden faces with EHR integrations. Research: current connected EHRs, pricing model, expansion beyond Sweden?
